speakers.Alex: Software engineer at Stripe, exploring ML/AI roles
speakers.Jordan: Close friend, apartment hunting in San Francisco

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: yo

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: heyyy

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: how was the hike

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: dude so good

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: point reyes was gorgeous

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: nice

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: did the tomales point trail. like 12 miles round trip

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: damn

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: that's a lot lol

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: yeah I can barely walk today 😂

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: haha

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: worth it tho. the views from the bluff were insane

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: jealous. I literally did nothing all weekend

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: nothing?? lol

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: ok fine I tried that new ramen spot on Valencia

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: oh which one

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: Mensho

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: honestly might be the best ramen in the city

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: oh damn high praise

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: the chashu was insane. and they do this truffle thing on the tonkotsu that's wild
messages.notes: Specific food preference and dish detail

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: ok I need to try it

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: yeah def go. go for lunch tho the line is shorter

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: noted

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: what else is new

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: not much honestly

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: oh I started watching severance finally

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: omg WAIT it's so good right

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: I'm 4 eps in lol

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: anyway gotta run. meeting in 5

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: later ✌️

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: ok I need to vent

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: oh no what happened

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: so remember that reorg from like three weeks ago

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: yeah

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: my team got completely split up. they moved me to payments core
messages.notes: Team change and new team name

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: but the real issue is my new manager. this PM named Derek

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: uh oh

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: zero engineering background. came from McKinsey or something

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: yikes

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: and today he literally told the team we need to 'be more agile' and 'move with urgency'

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: lmao the consulting brain

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: honestly the culture at Stripe has just gotten so corporate. it's not the same company I joined
messages.notes: Opinion about employer culture, names Stripe

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: I joined in 2022 right after their layoffs and even then it was different

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: yeah I remember you saying that

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: I'm seriously thinking about leaving

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: like actively looking?

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: yeah. updated LinkedIn last week, already got a few recruiter messages

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: oh nice

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: looking at ML infrastructure roles mostly. maybe research engineering

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: honestly anything in AI. I'm so done with fintech

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: I can see that

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: there's a couple interesting ones. Anthropic has a role that looks perfect actually

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: oh Anthropic is sick. my friend Lisa works there actually
messages.notes: Casual fact: friend name and employer

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: wait really?? what does she do

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: she's on the research team I think. loves it there
messages.notes: Friend role, enables future intro reference

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: hmm interesting. I might ask you for an intro

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: yeah for sure just lmk

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: anyway enough about my work drama. how's the apartment hunt

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: ugh brutal

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: I've been looking mostly in Hayes Valley and the Mission

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: but like a decent 1br in Hayes Valley starts at 3k minimum

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: god that's insane

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: yeah. I'm trying to stay under 2800 if possible

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: might have to expand out to the Richmond or Sunset

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: honestly the Richmond is underrated

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: ughhhh

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: uh oh

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: worst. day.

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: what happened

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: Derek called an all-hands to basically tell the eng team we're all underperforming
messages.notes: Work event with manager name callback

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: oh god

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: in front of like 40 people

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: that's so unprofessional

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: RIGHT

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: I'm so done with this place honestly

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: I'm sorry dude

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: I literally had Blind open during the all-hands lol
messages.notes: Casual fact: browsing job site at work

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: haha ok that's kinda iconic

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: half my old team has left already. like 4 people since the reorg

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: damn

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: it's been like this since the reorg in October honestly

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: do you think it'll get better

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: honestly no

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: yeah

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: whatever. how was your day

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: fine. nothing crazy. hey you wanna grab a drink this week? you seem like you need one

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: god yes please

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: Thursday? that bar on 16th

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: works for me 👍

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: cool. hang in there ❤️

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: ok spill

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: about what 👀

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: the DATE. you went out Saturday right??

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: haha ok ok so

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: her name is Priya. she's a product designer at Figma

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: oh nice

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: we matched on Hinge like two weeks ago and been texting nonstop
messages.notes: How they met + casual temporal fact

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: went to this wine bar in Noe Valley called Wildhawk

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: oh I've been there actually. they have that little garden patio right?

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: yes! that's where we sat actually. it was perfect

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: honestly we ended up talking for like three hours

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: oh damn

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: I haven't clicked with someone like this in so long honestly

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: she's really into rock climbing

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: and she lived in Tokyo for two years after college which is so cool

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: oh wow that's awesome

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: yeah I've been wanting to try climbing honestly. she's gonna take me to her gym, Dogpatch Boulders

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: haha watch you become obsessed

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: probably lol

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: oh and she's really into indie music. Japanese Breakfast, Mitski, that kind of stuff
messages.notes: Music preferences with specific artist names

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: solid taste

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: right?? we're going out again this Thursday

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: she picked this sushi spot in Japantown. Sushi Sato

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: oh nice I've heard good things

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: I'm excited honestly

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: ok but enough about me. APARTMENT. what happened with the viewings

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: OK SO

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: I think I found one

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: wait WHAT

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: yeah! a 1br on Balboa St, between 6th and 7th Ave. inner Richmond
messages.notes: Full address details of new apartment

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: omg

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: $2,400 a month

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: dude that's honestly so good for a 1br

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: I know right? and it's a corner unit so it gets a ton of natural light
messages.notes: Apartment feature: corner unit, natural light

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: hardwood floors, laundry in the building, and there's a little balcony off the bedroom
messages.notes: Multiple apartment features: floors, laundry, balcony

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: I can move in December 1st

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: that's amazing congrats!! 🎉

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: thanks I'm so relieved. been looking since September honestly
messages.notes: Emotional relief + apartment search start month

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: was that like two and a half months of searching?

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: yeah basically. saw probably 15 places before this one lol
messages.notes: Casual fact about total places viewed

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: ok so guess what

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: what

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: I have an interview at Anthropic next Tuesday

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: WAIT

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: are you serious

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: dead serious. recruiter reached out last week and it moved super fast

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: dude that's huge

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: I know I'm kind of freaking out honestly

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: it's for a senior ML infrastructure role on the core platform team

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: wait you should talk to Lisa. my friend who works there remember?

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: oh right!! yeah can you intro me?

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: already texted her. she said she'd be happy to chat
messages.notes: Action taken: arranged intro with Lisa

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: you're the best

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: it's a full day thing. five interview rounds

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: oh damn what are the rounds

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: system design, two coding rounds, behavioral, and then a team lunch with the hiring manager

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: that's intense

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: yeah I've been doing leetcode every night this week 😭

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: oh god leetcode

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: it's miserable but I'm doing like 4 hours a day at this point lol

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: Lisa actually sent me some tips which was really helpful
messages.notes: Prep fact: Lisa provided interview tips

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: oh nice what'd she say

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: she said the system design round is the hardest and they really care about scale and reliability thinking

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: makes sense for an AI company

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: yeah. anyway how's the new place??

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: it's great honestly. I love the neighborhood. so many good restaurants on Clement St

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: only issue is the heater's broken

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: wait what? you just moved in

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: yeah it's been out since day one. I've emailed the landlord three times now

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: it's getting cold too. that's not ok

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: the building is from like the 1920s so everything is ancient

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: honestly I might have to file a complaint with the city if he doesn't fix it this week

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: you should honestly. you're paying 2400 a month for that place
messages.notes: References prior rent amount as support

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: yeah you're right

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: ok gotta go study. wish me luck Tuesday 🙏

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: JORDAN

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: I GOT IT

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: wait WHAT

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: THE ANTHROPIC JOB??
messages.notes: Clarifying context, links to prior sessions

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: YES

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: DUDE

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: I know I'm literally shaking rn

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: congrats oh my god 🎉🎉

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: the recruiter called like an hour ago with the formal offer
messages.notes: Temporal detail about when offer arrived

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: ok so details. title is Senior ML Infrastructure Engineer

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: base is $245k

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: holy shit

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: plus RSUs over 4 years. total comp is like $380k all in

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: that's almost a 40% raise from what I'm making at Stripe

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: you deserve it honestly. especially after the Derek saga

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: thanks man. seriously

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: start date is January 6th

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: so I gotta give notice at Stripe basically next week

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: wow that's coming up fast

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: yeah I'm telling Derek on Monday lol

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: lol bet that'll feel good

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: I'm not gonna lie... yeah kinda

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: their office is on Mission St near Embarcadero. like 20 min bike from my place

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: oh nice. isn't that right by the Ferry Building?

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: yeah pretty much! they have this rooftop deck apparently which is cool

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: honestly I haven't been this excited about anything in a long time

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: I can tell. this is so your vibe

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: haha Priya was actually the first person I called. before my parents even

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: oh wow things are really serious with her huh

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: yeah we've been seeing each other every weekend. it's been like a month and a half now

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: I love that for you. new job, new girl, whole new chapter

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: ok that's cheesy but yeah honestly this fall has been wild

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: we need to celebrate. Friday? I'm buying

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: no way I'm buying. consider it a preview of my first paycheck lol

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: haha deal. proud of you dude ❤️
